name: portfolio
readmeSummary: Developed a production-ready, full-stack AI-powered portfolio using Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript, integrating Gemini for an interactive AI assistant with RAG capabilities. ...
title: portfolio
category: Full Stack Web Development, Generative AI
keyFeatures: Responsive animated portfolio with projects, skills, experience, and education
Floating "Mandeep AI" assistant with streaming responses
Grounded portfolio retrieval and structured tool calling
Project, resume, contact, and Calendly result cards
Session-scoped chat history, retry, stop generation, and Markdown rendering
Protected /admin content editor with server-side validation
Persistent production content through Upstash Redis
PDF resume uploads through Vercel Blob
Local retrieval and content fallbacks for development
recruiterSummary: Developed a production-ready, full-stack AI-powered portfolio using Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript, integrating Gemini for an interactive AI assistant with RAG capabilities. Implemented robust features including server-side authenticated admin for content management, persistent data storage with Upstash Redis, and Vercel Blob for secure resume uploads. This project demonstrates strong expertise in modern web development, scalable architecture, and advanced AI integration, effectively showcasing dynamic skills and project experiences.
problemSolved: This project solves the problem of effectively and interactively showcasing a developer's skills, projects, and experience to potential employers through a dynamic and AI-enhanced platform.
learningOutcomes: Implementing a full-stack Next.js application with TypeScript and modern UI frameworks.
Integrating advanced AI capabilities (Gemini, RAG) for interactive user experiences.
Building secure, authenticated admin interfaces with robust server-side validation.
Managing persistent data using external services like Upstash Redis and Vercel Blob.
Developing responsive and animated user interfaces with Framer Motion and Three.js.
Understanding and utilizing Web Streams API for real-time, streaming data responses.
Configuring and deploying complex Next.js applications to production environments (e.g., Vercel).
